india_trends.title: Buy the dips now; IT our big contra bet, positive on large private banks: Daulat Wealth's founder and CEO
india_trends.summary: Varun Fatehpuria of Daulat Wealth says this is the best time to be a buyer. He suggests focussing on large caps where value is clear. Small and midcaps at 32 times median PE are still 59% above their long-term average.

india_trends.title: Wipro Q4 preview: Inorganic growth to support topline; margins seen weak, say analysts
india_trends.summary: Wipro is set to announce its Q4FY26 earnings on 16 April, with expectations of weak performance and modest growth driven by acquisitions. Analysts predict revenue declines and cautious guidance despite a stable deal pipeline.

india_trends.title: ICICI Pru AMC outpaces industry growth in Q4, but headwinds are gathering
india_trends.summary: While the asset manager is outperforming its peers, rising regulatory hurdles and shifting market dynamics may prompt a pivot toward new growth levers.

india_trends.title: Has LT Foods overcome tariff-led pain?
india_trends.summary: LT Foods is recovering from US tariff hikes by leveraging strong brand pricing power and a recent reduction in import duties from 50% to 18%. While high paddy costs are still a risk, diversified revenue streams and a 13% projected growth rate support a stable valuation.

india_trends.title: Copper hits one-month high as US-Iran talk hopes lift metal prices
india_trends.summary: Copper prices hit a one-month high as renewed hopes for US-Iran dialogue lifted sentiment across global commodity markets. LME and Shanghai copper futures jumped, supported by stronger Chinese demand, tighter supply conditions and a softer US dollar. Other base metals, including aluminium, nickel an

india_trends.title: Govt should cap charges of product testing under quality control order: GTRI
india_trends.summary: High testing and certification costs for Quality Control Orders (QCOs) are pushing many MSME importers out of business, according to GTRI. The think tank urged the government to cap testing charges and recognize foreign lab reports to support the 'Make in India' initiative and prevent market dominat

india_trends.title: 360 ONE Asset secures Rs 2,000 crore in commitments for its PIPE strategy
india_trends.summary: 360 ONE Asset attracted strong investor confidence by raising ₹2,000 crore for its PIPE strategy, reinforcing demand for structured private equity deals.

india_trends.title: IT stocks to rally on Wednesday? Infosys, Wipro ADRs surge up to 5%. Here's why
india_trends.summary: IT stocks may rally on Wednesday as Infosys and Wipro ADRs surged overnight, supported by strong gains in US tech stocks and easing fears of AI-driven disruption. Optimism over renewed Iran-US peace talks and falling crude prices softened macro concerns, boosting sentiment for Indian IT companies he

india_trends.title: RBI sets SGB premature redemption for 15 April: Check profit on 10 units
india_trends.summary: The RBI has set 15 April 2026 as the date for early redemption of the Sovereign Gold Bond 2019-20 Series-V. The redemption price is ₹15,009 per unit.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Nifty set to reclaim 24,000 as US-Iran dialogue hopes lift global cues
india_trends.summary: Improving global cues on optimism around US-Iran talks are likely to push the Nifty back towards the 24,000 level, signaling renewed bullish momentum.

india_trends.title: ICICI Bank board to discuss fundraising, buyback of debt on this date; check details
india_trends.summary: ICICI Bank will discuss fundraising and buyback of debt securities at its board meeting on April 18, 2026. The bank will also hold a media call to present its financial results for Q4, with expectations of stable performance and growth across key metrics.

india_trends.title: India's strong fundamentals to cushion oil shock, growth may slow up to 80 bps: S&P Global Ratings
india_trends.summary: India's strong economic and financial foundations are expected to absorb a sustained oil price shock, though growth could dip by 80 basis points if crude hits $130/barrel in 2026. Corporate earnings and bank asset quality might weaken, but robust balance sheets and well-capitalized banks offer signi

india_trends.title: Intel’s $100 billion April rally makes it market’s hottest stock
india_trends.summary: Intel has emerged as one of the hottest S&P 500 stocks, adding over $100 billion in market value during a nine-day, 53% rally. A string of positive developments has revived confidence in its turnaround prospects after years of underperformance, with investors increasingly betting the chipmaker c

india_trends.title: Nifty finds support: Nagaraj Shetti spots 2 breakout stocks worth watching
india_trends.summary: Nifty's Monday pullback is a technical dip, not a trend reversal, says HDFC Securities analyst Nagaraj Shetti. After forming a higher bottom, the index finds strong support at 23,400-23,500, with 24,500 the near-term target once it clears 24,100. Shetti recommends buying Glenmark Pharmaceuticals (ta

india_trends.title: DIIs bet big on these 9 stocks in Q4. Are you holding any?
india_trends.summary: DIIs raised stakes in nine Nifty 500 stocks in Q4, signalling strong institutional conviction and expectations of sustained earnings momentum.

india_trends.title: Gold prices in India fall 6% since US-Iran war: Is this the right time to buy gold?
india_trends.summary: Gold prices have declined due to the rise in the US dollar amid the US-Iran war which has driven crude oil prices to multi-year high levels. Since crude oil is traded in the US dollar, the rise in oil prices drives dollar demand and raises its value.

india_trends.title: Gold price outlook: 6 Reasons why the yellow metal is down 20% from peak: Is this the right time to buy?
india_trends.summary: Gold prices have corrected nearly 20% from January due to various macroeconomic pressures, including a strong dollar and rising bond yields. Market experts advise a measured investment approach, as gold's long-term fundamentals remain positive despite current volatility and geopolitical risks.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | Japan's Nikkei rallies to six-week high as oil eases on Iran optimism
india_trends.summary: Japan’s Nikkei surged to a six-week high as easing oil prices and renewed optimism over US-Iran talks boosted investor sentiment across global markets.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | Australia Inc starts to feel Iran war fallout, raising stagflation risk
india_trends.summary: Australia's economy faces a stagflationary shock as the Middle East conflict drives up fuel prices. Top companies like Qantas and Westpac are issuing profit warnings, citing soaring costs and customer impacts.
